# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

import jenkins.model.*
def call() {   // define the method 'call' for Groovy DSL scripting 
    pipeline {     // start of a new Jenkins Pipeline job definition block (start)
        agent any       // use all available agents in parallel execution mode, ie., one per node. This is default setting if not specified otherwise  
        
        stages{      // define the stage 'stages' for Groovy DSL scripting 
            stage('Download Artifacts') {    // start of a new Stage block (start) with name as "Stage1" and description. This is default setting if not specified otherwise  
                steps{     // declare step to run the Jenkins pipeline in parallel mode, ie., one per node 
                    script {      // define 'script' for Groovy DSL scripts   
                        env.URLS = [params.url1: params.artifactName1 , ...]   // assigning external URLs and artifact names as parameters to the environment variable "env"    
                        
                        withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId:'aws-access', usernameVariable:'ACCESS_KEY', passwordVariable:'SECRET_KEY')]) {  // use Jenkins Credential for AWS access key, secret and region  
                            env.AWS_REGION = 'us-east'    // assigning the aws credentials to environment variable "env"    
                            
                            withCredentials([usernamePassword(credentialsId:'jenkins', usernameVariable: '', passwordVariable:'')]) {  // use Jenkins Credential for jenkin user and pass  
                                env.JENKINS_USER = 'admin'    // assigning the credentials to environment variable "env"    
                                                           
                                    sh """#!/bin/bash -xe      # define shell script block (start) with name as JenkinsScriptBlock1, description etc 
                                        aws s3 cp --recursive ${URLS} /tmp    // copy files from external URL to local directory  
                                     """     // end of the Shell Script Block for AWS S3 COPY command. This is default setting if not specified otherwise      
                            }      // End Jenkins credentials block (end) 
                        }        //End withCredentials blocks and environment variable assignments   
                    }         // ends script  
                }          // end steps    
            }             //ends stage Download Artifacts. This is default setting if not specified otherwise
